subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! His Holiness Minshádí hath ascended to the horizon of eternal glory and hath vanished in the West in the path of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان حضرت منشادی بافق عزت ابدیه صعود و در مغرب فنا در سبیل الهی
subcodes.subjects: @high station of learning, @call to action, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @martyrs and martyrdom, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
